export { default as Kbd } from './kbd.svelte';
export { default as KbdGroup } from './kbd-group.svelte';

<script lang="ts">
	import type { Snippet } from 'svelte';
	import type { HTMLAttributes } from 'svelte/elements';
	import { cn } from '$lib/utils.js';

	type Props = HTMLAttributes<HTMLElement> & { class?: string; children?: Snippet };
	let { class: className, children, ...rest }: Props = $props();
</script>

<kbd class={cn('inline-flex items-center gap-1', className)} {...rest}>
	{@render children?.()}
</kbd>

<script lang="ts">
	import type { Snippet } from 'svelte';
	import type { HTMLAttributes } from 'svelte/elements';
	import { cn } from '$lib/utils.js';

	type Props = HTMLAttributes<HTMLElement> & { class?: string; children?: Snippet };
	let { class: className, children, ...rest }: Props = $props();
</script>

<kbd
	class={cn(
		'inline-flex h-5 min-w-5 items-center justify-center rounded-md border border-border bg-muted px-1.5 font-mono text-[0.7rem] font-medium text-muted-foreground shadow-bevel',
		className
	)}
	{...rest}
>
	{@render children?.()}
</kbd>
